population.note: Among the fastest-growing cities in Canada (Stats Canada census 2021)

physician_shortage.note: Brampton has roughly half the family doctors per capita as the Ontario average.

er_wait_times.note: Brampton Civic ER consistently posts P90 wait times more than 2x the Ontario average; documented hallway medicine since 2017.

health_equity.note: Region of Peel Public Health: chronic disease burden disproportionately affects South Asian and Black residents.

stakeholders.name: William Osler Health System
stakeholders.role: Operates Brampton Civic Hospital and Peel Memorial Centre

stakeholders.name: Ontario Health (Central Region)
stakeholders.role: Regional planning, wait-time API, Digital Health Playbook

stakeholders.name: Punjabi Community Health Services
stakeholders.role: Multilingual health outreach for South Asian community

stakeholders.name: City of Brampton (2040 Vision Office)
stakeholders.role: Strategic alignment with Living the Mosaic - Health & Well-Being

vision_2040_pillars.name: Health & Well-Being
vision_2040_pillars.alignment: Faster access to appropriate care, lower ER overcrowding

vision_2040_pillars.name: Social Inclusion & Equity
vision_2040_pillars.alignment: Multilingual support, accessible voice/text intake, demographic-aware routing

vision_2040_pillars.name: Community-Based Living
vision_2040_pillars.alignment: Routes to neighbourhood walk-ins and telehealth, not just hospitals

vision_2040_pillars.name: Technology & Resilience
vision_2040_pillars.alignment: Surge mode, offline protocol cards, predictive load balancing, cyberattack failover
